ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the order (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order including discounts and shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the order was placed (e.g., Online, In-Store, Mobile App) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Corporate, Home Office) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "state_or_province" TEXT /* State or province where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer for contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Office Supplies) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product (e.g., Pens & Art Supplies) */,
  "container" TEXT /* Container type of the product (e.g., Wrap Bag) */,
  "base_margin" REAL /* Base margin of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the product */,
  "order_item_status" TEXT /* Status of the individual order item (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the shipment belongs to */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., Express Air, Regular Air) */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier (e.g., FedEx, UPS) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipment was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the return belongs to */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Not Returned, Returned) */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., Damaged, Wrong Item, Not Needed) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Sales Manager, Data Analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the manager account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the sale belongs to */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profits" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the profit belongs to */,
  "profit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the profit */,
  "profit_date" TEXT /* Date when the profit was calculated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profit was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the profit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profits_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantities" (
  "quantity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantity */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the quantity belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quantity was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantities_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantities_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
